name: collections
notes: List, Set, and Map are intended to be Clyth-space runtime containers built on compiler-backed arrays and keyed arrays. Alpha 0.4 pass 5A detects concrete generic uses and generates stable instantiation names as the first step toward runtime execution. Set/Map hashing is runtime-owned through module-hash; compiler scaffolding remains temporary until 5B/5C/5D remove it safely.
